sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Business Model Classification
required_elements: Data center model type classification (hyperscale operator, colocation provider, carrier-neutral, wholesale, edge, managed services)
Geographic footprint mapping (Tier 1, Tier 2 markets, power availability)
Chinese data center operator unique dynamics (data localization, 'East Data West Compute', regulatory approval)

sections.title: Unit Economics — The Power Economics Model
required_elements: Revenue per megawatt (MW) benchmarking by model type
Power usage effectiveness (PUE) trajectory and cost per kWh analysis
Cooling economics assessment (liquid cooling capability, CapEx premium for AI-ready)
Capacity utilization rates and absorption rate trending
Lease and contract economics (WALT, churn rate, renewal spread, customer concentration)

sections.title: AI Demand Catalyst — The GPU Density Revolution
required_elements: AI-ready capacity percentage and liquid cooling infrastructure assessment
GPU/AI customer pipeline and backlog analysis
CapEx premium quantification for AI infrastructure
Power sourcing capability for AI scale deployments

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: Revenue structure decomposition (recurring, interconnection, one-time services)
EBITDA margins by business model and maturity stage
REIT valuation framework (AFFO vs. net income distinction for REIT operators)
Capital structure assessment and construction pipeline funding analysis

sections.title: Risk Architecture
required_elements: Power availability risk (utility interconnection queues, power constraint assessment)
Overbuilding risk and lease rate compression scenarios
Technology obsolescence risk (air-cooled facility stranding as AI demands grow)
Regulatory risk (data sovereignty, environmental, zoning restrictions)
Customer concentration risk (hyperscaler dependency)

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Declining utilization while new capacity comes online indicator
Negative renewal spreads signal (oversupply detection)
CapEx acceleration without pre-lease commitments (speculative building)
Power procurement costs vs. lease rate trends (margin compression signal)

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Power procurement and utility queue analysis with specific utility and timeline data
AI capacity readiness assessment (liquid cooling capability, power density, retrofit CapEx)
Customer pipeline validation (signed LOIs, pre-lease coverage, hyperscaler relationship depth)

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Revenue per MW metric calculated and benchmarked against peers
PUE trend analysis present with industry comparison
AI infrastructure CapEx premium quantified with liquid cooling assessment
Customer concentration risk explicitly calculated (top customer %, top 5 %)
Power procurement strategy documented with utility relationships mapped
Investigation tracks include specific utility names, interconnection timelines, and hyperscaler PPA data requirements
